title: Full portfolio build: 2 casefiles + 8-work product wargame product + 7 interview drills
public_claim: Full portfolio build: 2 casefiles + 8-work product wargame product + 7 interview drills is a preserved project packet for unclassified, employer-ready starter kit for wargaming / red-team / scenario-analysis roles across public sector (DoD/IC/USAJOBS GS), FFRDCs (MITRE, CNA, IDA, RAND), contractors (BAH, CACI, Leidos, SAIC, Amentum, SPA), and private-sector crisis/cyber/resilience practices.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
use_value: It preserves adversarial review machinery: assumptions, vulnerabilities, rival interpretations, replay evidence, and acceptance gates can be inspected before a claim advances.
